payload.description:
Feature: TactusScore GPT-5 controls

Scenario: A TactusScore sets reasoning effort and verbosity
Given a TactusScore YAML includes reasoning_effort and verbosity
When the score predicts with Tactus
Then those settings are passed to the Tactus runtime

Scenario: A TactusScore omits GPT-5 controls
Given a TactusScore YAML omits reasoning_effort and verbosity
When the score predicts with Tactus
Then Plexus does not send those settings and model defaults apply

Scenario: A TactusScore uses invalid GPT-5 controls
Given a TactusScore YAML includes invalid reasoning_effort or verbosity
When the score is loaded
Then validation fails before prediction
payload.title: Configure TactusScore GPT-5 controls
